description: Fix pre-existing lint errors across all apps and add CI lint gates
deviation_notes: IM3 had 5 lint errors (not 12 as tech-debt suggested). BM2 had 1. IM1/IM2/PreCalc were already clean. CI gates added for IM1/IM2/PreCalc with lint+typecheck+build; test gates deferred due to pre-existing Convex provider test failures.
